resources.string: Live temperature, signal, and connectivity monitoring
Your Datadog API key. Find it under Organization Settings then API Keys.
Select the Datadog region for your organisation.
Unique identifier for this unit. Sent as device:id on every metric and event. Example: ct47_warehouse_01
How often metrics are collected and sent to Datadog.
Send verbose diagnostic logs to Datadog. Disable in production.
Comma-separated key:value tag pairs, max 5. Example: env:prod,location:warehouse_a,fleet:ct47
